name: Toung Loong Textile MFG. Co., LTD.
summary: Toung Loong Textile MFG. Co., LTD. operates as a textile manufacturing company in Taiwan. It develops and produces air and draw textured, shape control twist, alpha yarn, and air textured covered yarns, as well as functional synthetic yarn dyes and sewing threads. The company was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
